description: Fix scripts/generate_html_report.py to properly render content plan HTML reports with full image prompts. Currently the generic template truncates image_prompt objects. Add a 'content_plan' report type that shows each post's image prompt in a readable, expandable format with copy-able text. Then regenerate data/content_plan_20260311_EN.html with the fix.
notes: Operator checked content_plan_20260311_EN.html and image prompts were missing. The JSON has them but HTML generator uses generic template that truncates nested objects. Fix the generator, then regenerate the HTML.
